name: Mohabbat Hogayee Aakhir
overview: Mohabbat Hogayee Aakhir is a romantic telefilm that beautifully explores the complexities of love, misunderstandings, and emotional connections. The story revolves around two individuals from different backgrounds who cross paths under unexpected circumstances. As they navigate through life’s challenges, their interactions evolve from animosity to understanding, ultimately blossoming into love.

trailers.title: Mohabbat Hogayee Aakhir | Bilal Abbas & Ramsha Khan | ARY Telefilm
